name: The Seattle Siding Company
description: Seattle's top-rated siding contractor. James Hardie Preferred Installer. Serving Greater Seattle since 2010.

services.name: Siding Repair
services.description: Board replacement, caulking, rot remediation, and moss treatment for Seattle homes.

services.name: Siding Installation
services.description: Professional siding installation for new construction and full replacements.

services.name: Siding Replacement
services.description: Full tear-off and replacement with James Hardie, vinyl, or cedar siding.

services.name: James Hardie Siding
services.description: Certified Preferred Installer for James Hardie fiber cement siding in Seattle, WA.

services.name: Vinyl Siding
services.description: Low-maintenance vinyl siding installation for Seattle homes and rental properties.

services.name: Cedar & Wood Siding
services.description: Cedar siding installation, repair, and restoration for PNW craftsman and Victorian homes.

services.name: Wood Rot Repair
services.description: Full wood rot assessment, remediation, and fiber cement replacement to prevent recurrence.

services.name: Asbestos Siding Removal
services.description: Safe asbestos cement siding removal and replacement in pre-1980 Seattle homes.
